title: Introducing Our Latest AI Features [share your feedback & shape our future plans!]
excerpt: Hey all, i’m Shai from the monday team and I wanted to make sure you know about our two exciting AI releases  currently available for Pro & Enterprise accounts. As always we would love to get your feedback about these ne…

posts.author: Shai_monday (Shai Passal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all, i’m Shai from the monday team and I wanted to make sure you know about our two exciting AI releases currently available for Pro & Enterprise accounts. As always we would love to get your feedback about these new AI capabilities:

  1. AI Column actions (e.g. Categorize, Summarize, and Custom Actions) - read more here monday AI | Your AI Business Partner

  2. AI-powered templates in the template center

If you tried these, how was your experience? What did you try to accomplish with the AI capabilities?

You’ll be helping us improve and have a chance to win community swag! (thanks to the kind @Julietteb )

Feel free to leave your feedback here in the comments or in our monday AI columns feedback

AI Column Action image1920×1112 96.3 KB

posts.author: Shai_monday (Shai Passal)
posts.cookedHtml: Here’s our feedback form looking forward to hearing what you think! monday AI columns feedback

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Shai,

Being able to use the Numbers column to fill in AI automations would be vastly beneficial.

It would basically make the upcoming formulas in automations feature obsolete.

posts.author: Sjurd (Sjurd Skutlaberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Shai,
I totally agree with @shayan.moussawi. Being able to fill in a numbers column would be a game changer.

posts.author: Shai_monday (Shai Passal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the feedback! this is really helpful.
Can you give an example of how you would use it?

posts.author: Shai_monday (Shai Passal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the feedback @Sjurd!
What would this help you with? would be happy to get an example

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sure!

Basically lets say we have a numbers column for our Deal value.

Then I would maybe want to calculate the forecasted deal value via an AI automatuon:

Telling the AI: Calculate the projected deal value based on these parameters: (then include other columns such as industry, company size etc.) and weigh these parameters accordingly.
Also telling it to return a number for it.

There are plenty of other use cases though. Basically it would allow to make all complex calculations you need stored on your board backend (unlike traditional formula columns which are just ‚displayed‘ but not actually stored on the board).

posts.author: Sjurd (Sjurd Skutlaberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sure!

I’m mainly thinking about the last point @shayan.moussawi made, where the calculated number is stored in a numbers column, and not just displayed in a formula column. This could then trigger automations that is based on a numbers column value.

posts.author: Lucas1 (Lucas)
posts.cookedHtml: When will this feature be available to EU-accounts?
